backlogName: VANTARIS ONE Airport POC Delivery Backlog

groups.summary: Establish airport spatial vocabulary, canonical Device/Point/Tag intake at scale, and topology projection without breaking Asset Graph ownership.

items.title: Airport/Terminal spatial extension contract
acceptanceTests: Registry documents Airport and Terminal as extensions of Site spatial model
Validator confirms Asset Graph remains canonical owner
No UFMS or UMMS asset write paths introduced
items.expectedRuntimeResult: Contract-only spatial extension ready for mapping; no production DB writes

items.title: Excel airport device/point bulk intake at representative scale
acceptanceTests: Representative multi-site package reconciles with bounded review ratio
Ephemeral read model projects Device/Point/Tag without persistence
Deterministic evidence digest across repeated runs
items.expectedRuntimeResult: Offline validated airport asset intake path for ~270k points class datasets

items.title: Tag cross-reference and LOCATED_IN relationship readiness
acceptanceTests: HAS_POINT parity gate passes for airport synthetic package
Unresolved LOCATED_IN remains diagnostic-only
Cross-system tag namespace collisions reported not silently merged
items.expectedRuntimeResult: Canonical relationship projections suitable for airport topology queries

groups.groupName: Source System Registry and Integration Health
groups.owner: ONE Integration Registry + Shared EDGE/LINK consumption
groups.summary: Define source-system catalog and integration health projections consuming shared EDGE/LINK — no ONE-private connector runtime.

items.title: Source System Registry contract and read API skeleton
acceptanceTests: Registry lists BMS/EMS/CCTV/ACS/PA/Security/e-Inspection/iFeedback/MMS types
Each source system has single owner and mappingVersion binding
Read-only API returns connection status fields without DB writes
items.expectedRuntimeResult: Bounded read-only source-system catalog for airport integrations

items.title: Integration health projection contract
acceptanceTests: Health payload includes heartbeat, last sync, last error, DLQ, throughput, freshness
No direct DB access from EDGE/LINK packages
Validator confirms no ONE-private EDGE/LINK duplication
items.expectedRuntimeResult: Integration health data contract consumable by UConsole projection

groups.summary: Intake external alarms through shared EDGE/LINK into UFMS-owned canonical Alarm objects with Asset Graph resolution.

items.title: EDGE normalized alarm to Asset Graph resolution handoff
acceptanceTests: Normalized alarm example resolves to Device/Point when mapping exists
Unmapped alarms produce bounded diagnostic records
No canonical Alarm persisted in Asset Graph
items.expectedRuntimeResult: Resolution contract from external alarm to canonical asset references

items.title: UFMS adapter canonical Alarm intake contract
acceptanceTests: Alarm severity/state/ack/clear/dedup fields defined in adapter contract
Synthetic alarm cannot authorize production write without real evidence path
Adapter uses /api/v1/adapters/ufms namespace only
items.expectedRuntimeResult: Contract-first canonical Alarm intake ready for UFMS runtime hookup

groups.summary: Implement airport POC FaultCase vertical slice from canonical Alarm through correlation to WorkOrderIntent emission.

items.title: Alarm to FaultCase vertical slice adapter
acceptanceTests: Alarm creates FaultCase with priority and evidence reference
Episode/Problem correlation fields validated in contract tests
UFMS remains fault SoR — no IBMS-owned FaultCase persistence
items.expectedRuntimeResult: End-to-end contract path Alarm → FaultCase for airport POC

groups.summary: Consume UFMS WorkOrderIntent and expose canonical WorkOrder API — resolve UMMS mock ownership ambiguity.

items.title: WorkOrderIntent consumer contract
acceptanceTests: WorkOrderIntent idempotently creates WorkOrder
UMMS does not create generic WorkOrder SoR records
/api/v1/work routes registered with governance audit
items.expectedRuntimeResult: Canonical WorkOrder created from FaultCase intent with asset/alarm/fault links

items.title: Asset Graph persistence cutover gate (airport subset)
acceptanceTests: Real sanitized evidence required for write authorization
Write cutover remains NOT_READY until explicit approval task
No dual-write introduced
items.expectedRuntimeResult: Persistence contract evaluated for airport asset subset without cutover

groups.summary: Execute corrective maintenance against canonical WorkOrder; add e-Inspection/iFeedback intake hooks.

items.title: UMMS corrective maintenance linked to WorkOrder
acceptanceTests: UMMS references WorkOrder by canonical ID only
Corrective maintenance lifecycle updates do not mutate WorkOrder SoR
Evidence emission on maintenance completion
items.expectedRuntimeResult: Corrective maintenance execution slice for airport POC work orders

items.title: Inspection checklist intake (e-Inspection / iFeedback)
acceptanceTests: Inspection results link to Asset and optional WorkOrder
External system type mapped in source-system registry
Read-only until maintenance dispatch enabled
items.expectedRuntimeResult: Inspection records available as maintenance evidence inputs

groups.summary: Deliver eight airport POC pages as read-only projections — no business SoR in UConsole.

items.title: Airport Overview and Alarms/Faults pages
acceptanceTests: Airport Overview renders module readiness and airport KPI placeholders from APIs
Alarms & Events page reads UFMS adapter API only
Fault Cases page reads UFMS adapter API only
UConsole performs no writes to business objects
items.expectedRuntimeResult: Four new or upgraded POC pages: Overview, Integration Health, Alarms, Fault Cases

items.title: Upgrade partial pages to airport POC contract
acceptanceTests: Assets & Topology shows airport terminal/building context when available
Maintenance Work Orders reads /api/v1/work not UMMS mock SoR
Evidence page shows fault/work-order linkages
items.expectedRuntimeResult: Remaining four POC pages meet airport acceptance layout

groups.summary: Airport KPI reports and end-to-end vertical slice acceptance validation.

items.title: Airport KPI report catalog
acceptanceTests: Reports cover alarm counts, open faults, WO status, integration availability, unmapped tags
All reports remain projection/read-only
MTTA/MTTR defined with explicit data dependency gates
items.expectedRuntimeResult: Airport KPI report catalog queryable for POC acceptance

items.title: Vertical slice acceptance validator
acceptanceTests: End-to-end synthetic airport scenario traverses T01–T09 transitions
Ownership and boundary validators pass
No write cutover performed without explicit approval
